task_description: Comprehensive Wise Business KYC compliance update for zevrian.com - remove WhatsApp, disable Amazon buttons, convert active-store to pre-launch language, add founder section, launch badge, footer LLC details, update meta descriptions, remove fake product data (ratings/reviews), ensure KYC consistency.

verification.summary: Cannot run build/tests in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY sandbox (no npm install). All changes verified via AST-level inspection (grep searches confirm: no WhatsApp refs, no Buy on Amazon text, no active-store wording, no ratings/reviews in products data, PreOrder in seo.ts, founder section present, LLC details in footer). Push to GitHub for Cloudflare Pages build validation.
